title: If container store isn't in standard location "podman info" prints nothing
body:
As seen here:

https://github.com/containers/qm/issues/367

I'm not sure if this is the right place to log this issue but the first error message is printed from containers/storage.

"podman info" should at least print this, if the container store is in a non-standard place that cannot be found (or non-existant):

```
version:
  APIVersion: 4.9.4
  Built: 1711445992
  BuiltTime: Tue Mar 26 09:39:52 2024
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.21.8
  Os: linux
  OsArch: linux/amd64
  Version: 4.9.4
```

comments.body: That should be reported in podman, generally speaking use podman version not info, info needs the store to report all the data so failing seem fine to me.
